programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Under House Arrest
programme.desc: Andrew and Gerrid celebrate a victorious moose hunt but a disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. A cold spell has everyone scrambling to build shelters and tensions between Oliver and the rest of the group reach explosive new heights.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Jet Crash, Train Collision
programme.desc: A military jet breaks apart and crashes. A spectacular motorcycle drag crash. 180 passengers are rescued off a sinking ship. A man survives being run over by a tractor trailer, and a safety capsule flies open during a drag boat crash.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Giant Bass Lake
programme.desc: Jimmy goes fishing in a giant bass lake in Texas with an old friend.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Saltwater Silvers with Wild Alaska
programme.desc: Mark Few and Larry Larson are chasing silvers in saltwater on the Perseverance.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Failed Brakes, Snowmobile Mistake
programme.desc: A car crashes into a computer store. A snowmobile jump comes up short. A motorcycle without a driver and a mad bull take aim at a crowd, and a forest fire is caught on camera.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Fish Kidz
programme.desc: The Guyz joins some friends for father-son fishing in Islamorada. Lain and George eat at Captain Craig's Restaurant.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Thyeesha Coleman
programme.desc: Army veteran Thyeesha Coleman shares her story.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Biscayne Bay Bonefish
programme.desc: George is Miami's Biscayne Bay searching for bonefish.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: The Depths of Pulley Ridge
programme.desc: Capt. Rick gets his fantasy fishing team together to take on Pulley Ridge.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Great Women of Egypt
programme.desc: Josh journeys through the land of the Nile to uncover the secrets of three of the most powerful, and most elusive, women in ancient Egypt: Hatshepsut, Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: Josh continues his journey through Egypt to uncover the secrets, and possibly the final resting place, of ancient history's most powerful women rulers: Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Tomb of the Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads to an active dig site in Egypt, where he joins famous archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass on the cusp of an incredible discovery: the mummy of an ancient High Priest.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Jerry Bites Back
programme.desc: Amy counts down the days until her delivery with an eccentric photo shoot, while the family worries that Jerry is derailing Tammy's diet. Tammy reveals her big secret to Jerry.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Everybody Hurts
programme.desc: When Tammy and Amy go see a psychic, they both get disturbing news. The family rallies together, and they are willing to try anything to help Tammy lose weight. Amy must face her worst fears when she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lupe's Story
programme.desc: At 600 pounds, Lupe spent the last 10 years in bed and totally dependent on her husband. A doctor in Texas is her only hope for change, but a cross-country move to save her life may end up backfiring.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Isaac's Journey
programme.desc: Isaac helped raise his siblings after his mom suffered a debilitating stroke when he was 10. While learning to cook for his family, he began comfort-eating. Now to avoid eating himself to death, Isaac must learn to take care of himself for a change.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Everybody Hurts
programme.desc: When Tammy and Amy go see a psychic, they both get disturbing news. The family rallies together, and they are willing to try anything to help Tammy lose weight. Amy must face her worst fears when she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Susan's Story
programme.desc: Weighing in at over 600 pounds, 37-year-old Susan is committed to drastic weight loss. When an unforeseen medical disorder strikes her mobility, finding the strength to make it through these obstacles is a matter of life and death.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Isaac's Journey
programme.desc: Isaac helped raise his siblings after his mom suffered a debilitating stroke when he was 10. While learning to cook for his family, he began comfort-eating. Now to avoid eating himself to death, Isaac must learn to take care of himself for a change.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Everybody Hurts
programme.desc: When Tammy and Amy go see a psychic, they both get disturbing news. The family rallies together, and they are willing to try anything to help Tammy lose weight. Amy must face her worst fears when she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Susan's Story
programme.desc: Weighing in at over 600 pounds, 37-year-old Susan is committed to drastic weight loss. When an unforeseen medical disorder strikes her mobility, finding the strength to make it through these obstacles is a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Nail in the Head
programme.desc: Firecrackers amaze the crowd at Diana's travel themed wedding, while Melea's theme highlights her road trip romance. Thunder and lightning give light to Nicole's purple nuptials while Leila sparkles with rhinestones and a bar made of ice.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Candle Bar
programme.desc: Melissa and her groom share their love at a Hollywood inspired affair, while Laura's waterside wedding is accented with Penn State flair. Audrianna's guests enjoy the glamour at her boat house venue and Dee's guests make their own favours at a candle bar.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Pilgrim
programme.desc: Wendy's guests are greeted by pilgrims, while Nicole's guests are treated to boat cruise around Boston Harbor.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Ballpark Peanuts
programme.desc: Lydia's big day includes music from a historic pipe organ and maracas, while Jennifer's day is all about her Portuguese heritage.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Swamp Buggy
programme.desc: Sarah's groom arrives to their country themed wedding in a swamp buggy, while Janelle's guests ride on rickshaws to her Asian inspired reception.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Wall of Flowers
programme.desc: Stephanie walks the aisle in a pre-owned designer gown and Diana's look is retro glam with a birdcage veil.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Dracula's Castle
programme.desc: Marie uses her six-figure budget to create an elaborate Dracula's Castle, while Zoranda has surprising news to shock her guests.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Red Velvet Funnel Cake
programme.desc: Nicolle's husband's college mascot helps cut their cake. Travia celebrates her wedding and her 30th birthday with bling.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Don't Sweat It!
programme.desc: Audrey pops the painful bumps that cover her body so she can feel relief. Felicia has a peculiar looking dark growth on her forehead. Krista's excessive sweating is so severe that on any given day she could fill up an entire milk jug with her sweat.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!
programme.desc: Gerard is lumpy, he has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Movie: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In an attempt to win back his girlfriend, Sonny becomes a foster parent to Julian, a child his friend Kevin never knew he had. As the most unlikely parent, Sonny begins to learn what responsibility as an adult truly is.

programme.title: Movie: I Now Pronounce You Chuck and Larry
programme.desc: A firefighter agrees to enter a same-sex marriage with one of his colleagues so he can name his children as his life insurance beneficiaries. The media soon turn the blessed event into headline news.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Biddy Sitting/Jolly Lodgers
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Pictures, Please/ Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stage Plight/ Antiqued Off
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to her crush, Benny, Luan tries out for the school play. When Clyde and schoolmate Zach bond over antiques, Lincoln finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: Top Ten: Worst Hurricanes of the 2000s
programme.desc: Fuelled by warm ocean water, they are the most violent and destructive storms on earth. We count down the worst Hurricanes to hit the planet since the start of the new millennium.

programme.title: Top Ten: Severe Outbreaks
programme.desc: History making tornadoes and deadly derechos from around the globe make the top ten list of the most severe outbreaks.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Jellyfish
programme.desc: Looking at the possibilities of surviving a massive avalanche, as well as a terrible sting from a jellyfish. Also featuring footage on deathly heat in the desert, white-water rapids and much more.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Tornadoes
programme.desc: Video of tornadoes tearing through an airport, a gas station and a trailer park is shown. What do you do when a tornado towers beside your car and how to survive a brutal twister that rips through a city is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: What would you do if a wall of ice threatened to crush your home? Could you cope being trapped in an elevator? Incredible video pits you against deadly black ice, intense sandstorms, and hungry alligators!

programme.title: Could you Survive? With Creek Stewart: Teenage Castaways
programme.desc: Three teenagers find themselves stranded on a remote northern Canadian island for three weeks, facing death by starvation as winter closes in. And, a quick hike in Utah's Bryce Canyon suddenly turns into a four-day struggle for survival.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Tanked
programme.desc: A tanker crash in Fraser Canyon has rookie operator Greg Mulligan in the middle of an epic recovery. As he deals with 47-thousand litres of deiseal and a mass of twisted metal, Greg's luck turns when Merc and Aggressive Towing's 50-ton rotator arrive.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: No Room For Error
programme.desc: A compromised trailer tears apart in Chatham. John Allen gambles with a truckload of water that's ready to burst wide open.

programme.title: Top Ten Most Extreme Places
programme.desc: Jim Cantore counts down the top ten most extreme places in the U.S. Places that endure epic conditions, the hottest, coldest, driest, stormiest spots and everything in between.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Phobias
programme.desc: Weather can be shocking and terrifying, but if a healthy respect of Mother Nature turns into an irrational fear, you may have a weather phobia. You aren't alone, as one in ten people have weather phobias, and we count down the top ten in this special.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Inventions
programme.desc: For centuries, man has worked to create devices that protect and prepare us for any type of weather. From the extreme to the practical, these are the inventions that help us co-exist with Mother Nature and the weather she unleashes.

programme.title: Mayday: Cold Case
programme.desc: An Air Ontario flight prepares for takeoff at a remote northern airport in heavy snowfall; moments later, the plane struggles to get airborne and crashes into the woods. It takes years for investigators to determine what went wrong.

programme.title: Mayday: Missing Over New York
programme.desc: In 1990, a Columbian flight hit a massive storm on its way to New York, forcing the plane to remain in a holding pattern above the city. Finally running out of fuel, the plane crashes into a wealthy suburb, resulting in controversial conclusions.

programme.title: Mayday: Cockpit Failure

programme.title: Fast Foodies: James Van Der Beek
programme.desc: 90s heartthrob James Van Der Beek challenges the chefs to create and remix a delectable and iconic Californian burger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: James Van Der Beek
programme.desc: 90s heartthrob James Van Der Beek challenges the chefs to create and remix a delectable and iconic Californian burger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig

programme.desc: Phil is jazzed to share the wonders of residential real estate with Luke and Manny’s classmates for career day, but unfortunately for Phil, his nemesis, Gil Thorpe, shows up and things get ugly.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Hero
programme.desc: Mitch’s ex-boyfriend, Teddy, a very personable and successful doctor, invites the whole family to a fundraising event at the local roller rink and they all run circles around each other.

programme.title: Modern Family: Games People Play
programme.desc: Phil gets a brand new RV with high hopes of going on a fun family road trip. Claire decides to let him learn the hard way why this will likely be a terrible idea.

programme.title: Modern Family: Goodnight Gracie
programme.desc: Everyone flies down to Florida to be with Phil after his mom’s passing. Claire helps Phil with Gracie’s last wish for Frank, and the kids reflect on the gifts grandma left for them.

programme.title: Modern Family: Suddenly, Last Summer
programme.desc: Phil and Claire try to orchestrate a kid-free week during Luke, Haley and Alex's summer activities; Cam and Mitch try to have a memorable summer.

programme.title: Modern Family: First Days
programme.desc: Luke and Manny have their first day of high school; Claire returns to the workforce.

programme.title: Modern Family: Larry's Wife
programme.desc: Phil seems to have found his wheelhouse in real estate with recently divorced women, but it's taking up a lot of his time. Meanwhile, Luke invites his buddies over for a high-stakes poker game in the basement.

programme.title: Modern Family: Farm Strong
programme.desc: Cameron's older, single sister, Pam, is coming for a visit, and Cam is in a panic to hide the engagement until he can delicately break the news to her, but it turns out she has news of her own. Phil and Claire decide to miss one of Luke's soccer games.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Late Show
programme.desc: Jay pulls some strings to get reservations at the new restaurant for an adult's night out. But, in each household, everyone is running late -- Gloria, as usual, is taking forever to get ready, and Claire and Phil are concerned about Luke being home alone.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Help
programme.desc: When Gloria hires a too-good-to-be-true male nanny, Jay and Manny are pretty much dead set against it. Frank is in town and feeling a bit lonely recently, so Phil and Jay take him out to help get his groove back. Mitch and Cam plan their wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The family attends the annual school fair, and Phil has a big 20th wedding anniversary surprise planned for Claire at the fairgrounds. Unfortunately, she simultaneously has a surprise for him back at home.

programme.title: Modern Family: ClosetCon '13
programme.desc: With some urging from Claire, Jay begrudgingly agrees to return to ClosetCon this year, and things get interesting when Jay is reunited with some old colleagues.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Philly's finest, Paras Shah, and Hawaiian chef Sheldon Simeon are brought in to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bear-Ware
programme.desc: The "Bear," Hal Holden-Bache, stands against model-turned-chef Derek Orrell in an all-out culinary battle. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and "The Chew's" Daphne Oz will decide which chef gets the chance to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Superchef, Supermodel
programme.desc: Superchef Anne Burrell teams up with supermodel Gigi Hadid to give Bobby a real taste of the spotlight. They're hoping international chefs Melissa Araujo and Max Robbins can blind Bobby with their brilliance and cat walk out a win.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rib-Stickers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into dishes that'll stick to your ribs. He finds clean eats in Sioux Falls, SD, elevated comfort food like a 25-ingredient meatloaf in Fairbanks, AK, and Midwest mashups in Moorehead, MN.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Diners A-Plenty
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls out to Kelly's Diner in Somerville, MA for the secrets of lobster rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes a seat at the family table; In Glendale, Ariz., a German restaurant making sauerbraten from scratch; In Northern California, an old saloon serving lamb shanks; And in Fort Worth, a Texas institution dishing up all the classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Who'Da Thunk It?
programme.desc: Guy visits a 50 year-old drive-in in Boise, Idaho where you can order prime rib. Then, a pizza joint in Sante Fe, N.M. where they offer green chillies as a topping. Plus, Jamaican cooking in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Classics
programme.desc: Guy explores classics from coast-to-coast; he starts in Portland and ends in Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast
programme.desc: Guy rolls out to some of America's greatest breakfast joints. He tries his luck with a famous dish with an unappealing name.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Dishes
programme.desc: Guy takes on unique eats. In Honolulu, a Jamaican joints serves up jerk chicken wings and goat curry. In Arlington, it's potato pancake stuffed with beef. And in Las Vegas, a taco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Stew
programme.desc: Guy's digging into some super sandwiches and savoury stew starting in Santa Fe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: College-Town Champs
programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Ordering All Kinds of Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four DDD alums via video chat. There's real deal Italian from Scottsdale, AZ, American Indian fare from Denver, gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dives Worth a Drive
programme.desc: Guy hunts down killer dives, including a nightclub in Cleveland that serves salmon BLTs.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Southern Comfort with Ricky Skaggs
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her longtime friend and fellow artist, Ricky Skaggs, and his wife, Sharon White, over for a meal filled with laughter and song.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Cozy Afternoon
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood meets with Leah, the owner of Nashville's herb and tea shop High Garden Tea, to gather ingredients for a warm, comforting meal.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Comfort Food, Cuban-Style
programme.desc: Valerie remembers a wonderful weekend in Miami, where all the fragrances and tastes of authentic Cuban food inspire her to recreate some Cuban comfort magic in her own kitchen.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Oh, The Weather Outside Is Frightful
programme.desc: Bad weather outside is perfect for snuggling inside, so Valerie Bertinelli and her husband, Tom, make comforting stay-at-home recipes like shrimp scampi with herb breadcrumbs, pull-apart garlic bread with asiago, and Helen's orange and fennel salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kitchen Confessional: Comfort Food
programme.desc: Ree is spilling the beans on her favorite comfort food. There are culinary hugs from chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Old-Fashioned Comfort
programme.desc: It's comfort from start to finish, and Ree Drummond's spelling it out in an old-fashioned, feel good way. First, C is for casserole -- tuna noodle casserole, that is. O is for open spaces and the great outdoors.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is speeding things up by giving her favorite comfort food recipes the 16-minute treatment, including chicken pot pie and shrimp and grits.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Freezer!
programme.desc: Ree is stocking the freezer with breakfast, lunch, dinner and dessert. To start, there are crunchy French toast sticks followed by Tex Mex butternut squash soup for lunch and casserole royalty with king ranch chicken. For dessert are confetti cups.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mecca of the Midwest
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a decadent Midwest meal in honor of her hometown, Chicago. She starts with sausage, peppers and onion deep dish pizza and Chicago corn dog bites, and then she makes sweet and salty caramel and cheddar popcorn mix and mint truffle bars.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Winter Farming Activities
programme.desc: While Molly Yeh's husband, Nick, and his dad are busy fixing all the farm equipment in the winter off-season, Molly makes comforting sweet flatbreads with lemon yogurt whipped cream for lunch to keep them warm.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Gal's Night In
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes some comfort classics for her friends, including maple bbq chicken and sweet potato waffles with fried green tomatoes. For dessert, she bakes espresso brownies with a mocha ganache that will keep the party warm and cozy.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Comfort Cooking with Ma
programme.desc: Ma's coming by for dinner, so Kardea Brown is cooking up some of her favorite comfort food classics, including Carolina Smothered Chicken with Creamy Mustard Sauce, Wild Rice with Mushrooms, Roasted Broccoli Salad and Sweet Potato Cheesecake.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Childhood Comforts
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are reinventing their favourite childhood comfort dishes and sharing special memories. Geoffrey Zakarian kicks things off with his mother's shepherd's pie. Katie Lee and Sunny Anderson give their childhood snacks a grown-up makeover.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Most-Searched Comforting Classics
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian makes savory Short Ribs; Jeff Mauro has two twists on Chicken Pot Pie. Katie Lee shares her Italian Style Meatloaf, and Keavy Landreth and Allison Kave from the bar Butter and Scotch show the perfect way to pair a cocktail with dessert.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Big Bacon Battle 2
programme.desc: Four pork-loving chefs cook up sizzling bacon dishes that will land one of them in hog heaven with up to $20,000! First, they must make the ultimate bacon dish, despite a nine-item shopping limit.

programme.desc: The Titans start speaking Pig Latin to prevent Robin from eavesdropping.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Loophole

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cycle
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais find out that Mr. Wilson has been bullying their dad most of his life. The kids try to help their dad and ultimately seek revenge against Mr. Wilson.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fuss
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are planning on seeing the scariest movie of the year, but everyone else has already seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid spoilers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stars
programme.desc: Dad gets a free haircut after giving Larry’s hairdresser a bad review, which inspires Gumball and Darwin to go on a reviewing spree in order to receive more free stuff.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The News
programme.desc: All the breaking stories from the Elmore newsroom.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Box

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Vase
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and accidentally break her latest hideous vase. When Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Gumball catches Darwin gazing wistfully at a photo of Teri on Elmore Plus and secretly enlists Carrie to help bring them together.

programme.title: American Dad!: Stan Goes on the Pill
programme.desc: Stan takes an experimental drug that instantly turns him into a 'woman.'

programme.title: American Dad!: She Swill Survive

programme.title: American Dad!: Rubberneckers

programme.desc: A rescue team is urgently deployed to help an injured hiker down Falling Waters Trail before rain comes, while Officer Bronson searches for an illegal pheasant hunter and Lt. Murphy stops an ATV rider on a prohibited road.

programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs
programme.desc: The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake and land, as summer is in full swing. Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun. An under-age drinker tells too many lies. Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Old Charm for Newlyweds
programme.desc: When Laura and John got engaged, they got a surprise early wedding gift in the form of a $1 million win on a scratch card. Now they are looking for a home with some old-fashioned charm and space to start a family in Massachusetts.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Vegas Dream Home
programme.desc: Down-and-out pro-boxer Damian hit hard times in Lancaster, California, before his dream came true and won $1 million on a scratcher. He immediately moved his family to Las Vegas, Nevada, and called in a design expert to help decorate.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Delaware Dream Home
programme.desc: A Staten Island couple's dream of trading their fast-paced life for quiet, relaxed Bethany Beach, Delaware, becomes a reality after they win a million dollars. David helps them find their forever home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Utah Mountain Dream Home
programme.desc: Nelly and Pablo were married for just a few months when they won $1 million in the Wyoming Powerball. Now they can afford their dream home in the mountains of Utah, and they're looking for a place that's big enough for their whole extended family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Million Dollar Bull's-Eye
programme.desc: Aubrey and Bristol purchase a small, rundown condo on the Vegas Strip for $117,000. Comps in the area are running around $150,000, so the couple knows they'll have to stick to a tight budget to make this one pay off.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Gail and Chet: Boston Dream Garden
programme.desc: After two years of searching, a woman's dream of living in the Boston suburbs is finally within reach after winning $1 million on a Massachusetts scratcher.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: First-Time Forever Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad heads to Dallas, Texas, to meet a couple who won the lottery in life and love! David has to be on his A-game because between this pair's construction and inspection experience, they really know what to look for in their forever dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Bliss in the 'Burbs
programme.desc: City boy Calvin is willing to move to the suburbs for his new bride, Denise, but that compromise just got a little easier after a quick pick Illinois lottery ticket won them a whopping $4.75 million.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bill and Eric hit the jackpot on the St. Patrick's Day lottery and couldn't believe their good luck. Now, the happy couple and their twins need help finding a larger family home on Chicago's classy North Shore.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Papa's Palace
programme.desc: Grandpa Jeff takes his 'papa' babysitting duties very seriously, so when he won $1 million in Roanoke, Virginia, he knew his dream home had to include a large backyard for his four grandchildren.

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Home Town: A Modern Millennial Makeover
programme.desc: An engaged couple is ready to buy a home of their own so they can start the next chapter in their lives together. An engaged couple is ready to buy a home of their own so they can start the next chapter in their lives together.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: The Serial Killer Among Us: Phillip Jablonski
programme.desc: When butchered bodies show up across California, investigators realize they're dealing with a depraved serial killer. With a kill list in hand, he's hunting for victims, keeping a macabre audio diary as he goes. No one knows where he is or if he'll stop.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murdered in the Cold of Winter

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Before He Was King

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Into the Eye of the Tiger

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Catch a Tiger by the Tail
programme.desc: Joe Exotic seeks a presidential pardon and keeps his spirits buoyed behind bars with the love of his husband and fan letters, as Don Lewis's handyman is confronted with allegations about his disappearance and Don's family seeks answers and closure.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Benefits
programme.desc: These deadly women discovered that death isn't always full of sorrow but sometimes has 'benefits.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Kin
programme.desc: Some women expect too much from their flesh and blood. When these Deadly Women convince their closest relatives to become a party to murder, they know their families won't let them down.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: A God-Fearing Woman
programme.desc: Naomi Huyard never strayed far from home, so her sudden vanishing rocks her tight-knit community to its core. When detectives make an unspeakable discovery, they soon realize there's much more to the story than meets the eye.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Amish Stud
programme.desc: When a young Amish wife is found murdered in her bed, police uncover a dark world they never imagine existed.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Damsel in Distress
programme.desc: A mysterious caller directs police to an eerily quiet suburban block, where they find the lifeless body of McDaniel Smith. The circumstances are hazy, until Demery learns of a caustic legal dispute and a wannabe hero with a history of violence.

programme.title: Home Alone: First Flame
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox is excited to start her senior year of high school after ending her abusive relationship with her boyfriend Adam. Unable to take the rejection, Adam breaks into her house with a bottle of gasoline and a lighter.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Evil in Idaho
programme.desc: Lisa Stukey lives in the small, picturesque community of Idaho Falls, Idaho. After she's not heard from for weeks, her decomposing body is found inside her home. When police finally catch the culprit, the killer has shocking ties to the victim.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: When Ashley Benson is found murdered in a trendy Portland hotel, detectives quickly dial in on three suspects, all of whom have been romantically linked to Ashley while Ashley's parents must come to grips with their daughter's secret life.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Secret Rage
programme.desc: For 17-year-old Sarah Wisnosky, college is all about new experiences. So when she catches the eye of a flirty frat boy, she's happy to play along. But soon, she discovers he's hiding a dark secret. Can Sarah break things off before it's too late?

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed the Music?
programme.desc: When John Tarwacki Sr. discovers the bodies of his son and daughter-in-law, the only story told at the scene is found in the snow. Boot prints reveal the path the killer took, but the search for motive will lead police in a startling direction.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village

programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago Neighborhoods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove. From handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part One
programme.desc: Spider-Man teams up with Spider-Girl, Ghost-Spider and Doc Ock to track down a new threat, the mysterious Goblin Nation.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Harry Osborn seek the Goblin King to determine who is behind the Goblin Mask.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Three
programme.desc: In order for Spider-Man to defeat the Goblin King, he must first bring together Doc Ock, Spider-Girl, Ghost Spider, Miles Morales and Harry Osborn as a team.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Goblin War: Part Four
programme.desc: Spider-Man and his friends must stop the Goblin King before he destroys New York City.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: The Blading Revolution!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Locked On! Lightning Launch!
Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: A man sees his wife being assaulted and abducted while video chatting with her. When the kidnappers demand ransom and send the missing housewife to pick up the money, detectives grow suspicious of her story.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dreams Deferred
programme.desc: A prostitute from an old case Benson worked proves crucial in finding a serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Criminal Stories
programme.desc: Renowned New York ledger columnist Jimmy MacArthur is given full access to Sergeant Benson and the squad for an inside look at the city's Special Victims Unit. While investigating a rape, MacArthur declares the case a hoax.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: American Disgrace
programme.desc: A basketball superstar announces his partnership with a clothing line. When a rep for the company comes forward with allegations of rape, the SVU team must decide whose story to believe.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Holden's Manifesto
programme.desc: A bike messenger creates a video diary of his trouble with women. Talk soon escalates to action, and the SVU scrambles to find his manifesto before he commits another violent act.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Institutional Fail

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rape Interrupted
programme.desc: A sergeant makes Benson choose between loyalty and duty when his son is accused of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rage
programme.desc: Detective Stabler must interrogate a murderer and a rapist.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Authority

programme.desc: Nicole stresses about Krissy going to college and Eddie learns how to be professional.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Let's Bee-Have

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Ballerina

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Bedtime

programme.title: Frasier: Martin Does It His Way
programme.desc: A loathsome, late great aunt leaves a legacy requesting that Frasier deliver her eulogy.

programme.title: Frasier: Leapin' Lizards
programme.desc: Frasier seeks retaliation for Bulldog's on-air jokes, landing Kate in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: Kisses Sweeter Than Wine
programme.desc: Frasier's home needs minor repair work before he hosts a wine-tasting party for his club.

programme.title: Reba: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Everyone panics when Kyra disappears during the middle of the night.

programme.title: Reba: The Big Fix-up
programme.desc: Reba goes on a blind date with a man from church; Van and Cheyenne butt heads over money.

programme.title: Reba: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A rebellious Reba takes Van's new sports car out for a spin and ends up scratching it.

programme.title: Reba: Happy Pills
programme.desc: Barbara Jean suspects that Brock may be having an affair; Kyra experiences boy problems.

programme.title: Reba: Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: During a girl's night out, tension between Reba and Barbra Jean causes a bar brawl.

programme.title: Reba: Core Focus
programme.desc: Barbra Jean asks Reba to help her tell Brock that she wants to have another baby.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil
programme.desc: Dorothy feels that it's her fault when her prized pupil wins a writing contest which inadvertently signals the INS that he’s an illegal alien.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: While Dorothy and Rose are planning a hospital charity banquet, Blanche falls for Jake, the caterer hired for the event. She quickly learns he's more blue jeans than a black tie which prompts her to foolishly put a stop to their romance.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Son-in-Law Dearest
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter arrives after she learns that her husband is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Olive Tree
programme.desc: The prize of Sunset Valley's annual olive oil contest is a land parcel with disputed ownership. Two people face-off to get it, and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: Love Struck Café
programme.desc: An aspiring architect takes on a major project in her home town and is forced to team up with an ex.

programme.title: Movie: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: When an ambitious doctor books an overdue vacation for some much needed R&R and bonding with her teenage daughter, the time away will have her questioning if this island holds the promise of something more.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: South Park: Buddha Box

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: South Park: SUPER HARD PCness
programme.desc: It's never been more challenging to be a PC Principal.

programme.title: South Park: Splatty Tomato
programme.desc: The children of South Park claim to have seen Mr. Garrison lurking around town. The townspeople are angry that the president is scaring their children.

programme.desc: A woman finds her murdered husband and the investigation reveals the man may have been living a double life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform
programme.desc: When it appears one of their own shot an unarmed man on a busy Boston subway platform, the team must fight to find the real killer while clearing their detective's name. It becomes clear that the circumstances surrounding the shooting are not clear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Rare Disease Day Special 2021
programme.desc: Shining a light on rare diseases and their impact on patients' lives-- profiling 2 TikTok influencers who are changing the face of rare. Plus an interview with the National Organization of Rare Diseases known as NORD.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Freedom
programme.desc: Meredith and Derek have one last shot at a successful outcome in their clinical trial, as the other surgeons work together to free a boy from a hardening block of cement. Meanwhile, Izzie helps Alex care for an ailing Rebecca.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Dream a Little Dream of Me
programme.desc: A freak ice storm brings trauma patients and a mysterious military doctor to Seattle Grace. Meanwhile, Meredith and Derek struggle with 'happily ever after' and the staff learns the hospital is no longer ranked as a top-tier teaching hospital.

programme.title: The Closer: War Zone
programme.desc: In a case that could carry national security implications, three soldiers are gunned down outside an L.A. club two days after returning home from duty in Afghanistan.

programme.title: The Closer: Last Woman Standing
programme.desc: Brenda's squad picks up a case from Hollywood involving the brutal murder of an aspiring actress who made a date through an online service. Meanwhile, Brenda prepares for an interview with the mayor to become the next Chief of Police.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Poster Boy
programme.desc: The team works strategically to capture a spree killer who has put everyone on high alert. Trying to solve the case quickly, Raydor is torn between two seemingly right decisions, each of which comes with major consequences.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: After a bad batch of drugs claims the lives of two brothers, the race is on for the squad to find the dealer before more of their fellow high school students are threatened. Meanwhile, Rusty is feeling smothered by his new security detail.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jailbait
programme.desc: When a newly released prisoner misses two back-to-back parole meetings, the squad is called in to track him down. Meanwhile, Sharon invites a therapist to the office to evaluate Rusty over a game of chess.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Family Matters
programme.desc: A woman finds her murdered husband and the investigation reveals the man may have been living a double life.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Horror in Apartment 345
programme.desc: Gorgeous 27-year-old Sasha Samsudean appears to be sexually assaulted and is found strangled in her luxury downtown Orlando apartment. Shocking surveillance video and a slew of clues ultimately lead investigators to the killer.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church
programme.desc: Missy Bevers was a mom and a fitness instructor in her community. As she’s setting up for an early-morning workout class at the local church, surveillance cameras capture a disturbing series of images; her killer, lurking the halls.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying
programme.desc: Lululemon employee Jayna Murray is found stabbed to death inside one of the company’s Washington, DC stores. Her co-worker is bound and bleeding in a room. As different suspects emerge, evidence starts to point to someone on the inside.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: One October: Massacre on the Strip
programme.desc: Stephen Paddock lived the lifestyle of the rich and famous in Las Vegas. Gambling up to $1M a day, he was known as a ‘whale.’ But a trip to Vegas in October, 2017 leaves 58 dead.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre
programme.desc: When five family members are found brutally murdered in the small Oklahoma city of Broken Arrow, police are on the hunt for a mass murder.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Nightmare in Fargo
programme.desc: Savanna Greywind couldn’t wait to be a mom. But just before her baby is due, the pregnant 22-year-old disappears from her own apartment. When the baby turns up alive, the investigation reveals a suspect close to home.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying
programme.desc: Lululemon employee Jayna Murray is found stabbed to death inside one of the company’s Washington, DC stores. Her co-worker is bound and bleeding in a room. As different suspects emerge, evidence starts to point to someone on the inside.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre
programme.desc: When five family members are found brutally murdered in the small Oklahoma city of Broken Arrow, police are on the hunt for a mass murder.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Nightmare in Fargo
programme.desc: Savanna Greywind couldn’t wait to be a mom. But just before her baby is due, the pregnant 22-year-old disappears from her own apartment. When the baby turns up alive, the investigation reveals a suspect close to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.
