programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: DC Madam: The Woman Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: 'DC Madam' Debroah Jean Palfrey was found dead under suspicious circumstances after threatening to expose the identities of those on her client list.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of the Killer Nanny
programme.desc: When an eight-month-old baby is fatally injured while in the care of his nanny Louise Woodward, was is abuse or an accident?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: JFK Jr's Final Flight
programme.desc: Examining the factors that led to the crash that killed John F. Kennedy Jr. and a never before seen interview with a person who may have been the last person to speak to JFK Jr, moments before the crash.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: A life-threatening cold front approaches the mountain and the family prioritizes shelters for their livestock. The task is easier said than done, as it will require the siblings to make a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Water to Ice
programme.desc: A deep freeze halts the water supply, sending the ranch into a new crisis. And with a critical load of lumber delivered to the base of their mountain, the Wolfpack must problem solve to get their house back on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: The Land Giveths and Takeths
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: The Browns prepare for a medieval-themed birthday for Baby Eli. Later, work on the main house is completed just before a massive wildfire strikes.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Legacy of Billy Brown
programme.desc: The Wolfpack celebrates the remarkable life of their patriarch Billy Brown. Through never-before seen footage and interviews, Billy speaks to the bush legacy he was driven to establish, fueled by faith and his love of family.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Raised Wild
programme.desc: After being pushed off their land, the unique Brown family of nine travels deep in the Alaskan bush to build a small shack where they will sleep. The Browns have lived their whole lives in the wild and often go six months without seeing an outsider.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Human Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Brown brothers are forced to step up when building a one-room cabin for the family. During some down time, the wolf pack of five goes into a small bush town to hunt for potential mates. It's the first time they've been in public together in months.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Blindsided
programme.desc: As the Browns race to finish their cabin, temperatures plummet and an illness hits the family. Their ability to survive the winter rests on the brothers as they race to get essential supplies and complete the home.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Legacy of Billy Brown
programme.desc: The Wolfpack celebrates the remarkable life of their patriarch Billy Brown. Through never-before seen footage and interviews, Billy speaks to the bush legacy he was driven to establish, fueled by faith and his love of family.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Raised Wild
programme.desc: After being pushed off their land, the unique Brown family of nine travels deep in the Alaskan bush to build a small shack where they will sleep. The Browns have lived their whole lives in the wild and often go six months without seeing an outsider.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Human Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Brown brothers are forced to step up when building a one-room cabin for the family. During some down time, the wolf pack of five goes into a small bush town to hunt for potential mates. It's the first time they've been in public together in months.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Blindsided
programme.desc: As the Browns race to finish their cabin, temperatures plummet and an illness hits the family. Their ability to survive the winter rests on the brothers as they race to get essential supplies and complete the home.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chadillac
programme.desc: Small-town custom car fabricator Chad Hiltz takes on his first build under his new banner at Hiltz Automotive. The team takes a stubborn '57 Cadillac and transforms it into a futuristic, chromed-out roadster fit for a king.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Trucker's Dream
programme.desc: The Hiltz Auto Company team pulls out all the stops for a local trucker with a dream. Using Chad's vintage toys as inspiration and utilizing Colton's improved welding skills, the team converts a '34 Oldsmobile sedan into a unique, functioning dump truck.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chad to the Bone
programme.desc: Chad gets pushed to his limits when a local body shop owner tasks him with his first-ever motorcycle build. With the Wharf Rat Bike Rally just two weeks away, Chad races the clock to visualize, customize and materialize the one-of-a-kind chopper.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Chad vs. Pinto
programme.desc: Chad takes on his most ambitious build yet: transforming a rusted-out 1971 Pinto into a European-style performance car framed in glass. With only four weeks to work and a mountain of problems facing him, Chad risks missing a deadline for the first time.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Nationwide Call Out
programme.desc: The 405's top five takes on the Nation's fastest street-race cars for bragging rights and huge payouts. Farmtruck and AZN pull a prank on Chief and Shawn to get back at them. Big Chief's got a score to settle with his biggest rival, Kye Kelly.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bristol: Race to $100K
programme.desc: The 405 are in Bristol, Tennessee to compete in the biggest no prep event in Street Outlaws history. With 32 of the baddest cars around competing for $100,000, the OKC racers give it everything they've got in order to take the win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bristol: Race to $100K Part 2
programme.desc: In the final throwdown, the 405 prove who's the baddest in Bristol.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days Comes to OKC
programme.desc: Thirty-two of the fastest racers from around the country gather in OKC for the biggest street race of the year Cash Days. And, with $50,000 on the line, all the racers are prepared to push their cars to the limit to try and win it all.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: A $50,000 Weekend
programme.desc: After round one of Cash Days in OKC, sixteen drivers are left to compete for the grand prize of $50,000, and the 405 is proud that half of them are OKC racers. But, the street proves to be slick, it's not clear that the risks outweighs the reward.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Eyes on the Prize (Bristol 2019) Part 1
programme.desc: The racers will give it their all to win the $200 000 at the Bristol No Prep race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Don't Rain on My Parade (Bristol 2019) Part 2
programme.desc: Sixteen racer move in round two of the Bristol No Prep, but the racers must adjust their tunes for a trickier track after a rainfall.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Strong or Being a Bitch
programme.desc: Janelle gathers Kody and the wives to talk about their increasingly tense family dynamic. Kody gets honest and says he doesn't want to advocate for polygamy anymore, and Robyn and Christine open up about their own insecurities as they question everything.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Felons No More
programme.desc: The Browns visit their polygamist friends to discuss the sudden and exciting possibility that polygamy will be decriminalized in Utah. The car trip to get there is a mess, but once there, the excitement is palpable.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Three's a Party
programme.desc: Julia thinks she's pregnant. Stephanie and Ryan have an explosive fight. Natalie demands answers. Jovi upsets Yara at their engagement party. Rebecca worries that Zied will change his mind. Tarik and Hazel pursue finding a girlfriend.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: About Last Night
programme.desc: Yara gives Jovi an ultimatum. Tarik and Hazel's ex causes new issues. Betty invites herself dress shopping. Natalie attempts to move forward. Zied makes new demands. Amira feels pressured to go to Serbia. Ryan's cousin joins Stephanie.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Robyn the Peacemaker
programme.desc: Mariah and Audrey are in town and share an exciting announcement with the family. Robyn tries to help Kody patch things up with Meri after their big fight on the property, but Kody pushes back and doesn't seem interested in fixing things.

programme.title: Unpolished: Worried Sick
programme.desc: Overwhelmed, overworked and over it, Lexi reaches her breaking point. Jen realizes everyone needs a pick-me-up and plans a glamping trip for the staff! Before they leave, Lexi gets a cuckoo request for a set of talking bird nails.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: About Last Night

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Murr's Farms Episode

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: UFOs and the Presidents: FDR to JFK
programme.desc: Investigators reveal the secret history between US Presidents and the UFO phenomenon, from FDR's knowledge about a UFO battle over Los Angeles to JFK's alleged plan to share extraterrestrial secrets with the Russians.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Police UFO Files
programme.desc: Using archival audio recordings, official transcripts and incident reports, UFO researchers investigate what really happened during incredible, and sometimes life-threatening, encounters between law enforcement and UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: American UFO Coverups
programme.desc: UFO sightings have been caught on film across America, yet the government continues to deny the existence of extraterrestrials. Recent news of the Pentagon's secret UFO program may reveal shocking evidence of what the military has known for decades.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: UFO Adbuction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: The Cars That Made America
programme.desc: In just two short decades, the car has begun to transform America. The country is in the process of being paved, and from coast to coast cities and towns are changing to suit the automobile. The middle class is growing thanks to the manufacturing sector.

programme.title: The Cars That Made America
programme.desc: In the aftermath of WWII, America is moving to the suburbs, fueling a huge demand for new cars. The Big Three spent the war building weapons and vehicles for the Allies, and haven't made a new car in years.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: The Chocolate Rush
programme.desc: Milton Hershey's stranglehold on the chocolate business is disrupted when a rush of competitors spring up, including his former employee HB Reese.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: The Kings of Burgers

programme.title: The Food That Built America: American Cheese
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, James Kraft and his new cheese innovation challenged thousands of years of tradition. Around the same time, the Pabst brothers introduced a shelf-stable cheese of their own.

programme.desc: Adam Richman visits a cheese maker in central Pennsylvania that insists on making mozzarella the authentic Italian way. Then, see how grocery giant Kroger slices, shreds and packages over two million pounds of cheese a week.

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me
programme.desc: Jessie gets her first big acting part in a Shakespeare production in the park. When Jessie and Zuri switch personalities, that leaves an eight-year-old trying to pull off Jessie's performance and keep from ruining it for her.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Look Who's Squawking

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie
programme.desc: Jessie is concerned that Tony has become controlling, clingy and insecure in their relationship. After Tony invites her out for a 'very special night' to meet his parents, she is terrified that he is going to propose.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Baxters Get Bounced

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jersey Shore Dogs
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore is in for a dose of discipline when Cesar heads for the boardwalk to help three families deal with their out of control dogs' situations.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Conquers London
programme.desc: Cesar is back in the United Kingdom for another episode of Dog Whisperer, but it isn't all garden parties and high tea.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: With Cesar's UK holiday drawing to a close, he lends a hand to the rehabilitation of three British canines.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anger Management

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear Factor

programme.desc: Summer's coming to an end, but Dr. Pol's clients are still rushing in!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cow I Met Your Mother

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Another One Fights the Doc
programme.desc: Not even a kick to the head keeps Dr. Pol from coming to the rescue of his clients.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pe-Pol's Choice
programme.desc: Some unique and surprising cases go on in the clinic.

programme.title: How It's Made: Plastic Cups and Cutlery, Special Effects Makeup, Gold, Harps
programme.desc: Follow the diverse manufacturing processes that yield plastic cups and cutlery, special effects makeup, gold, and harps.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fencing Masks, Books, Ocean Drone Transformers, and 3D Puzzles
programme.desc: We find out how fencing masks, ocean drone transformers, and 3D puzzles are made.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Skull Grave
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate new leads, and when they meet a Native American professor who provides new information, they realize they must expand their investigation to the East Coast.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Skull Grave
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate new leads, and when they meet a Native American professor who provides new information, they realize they must expand their investigation to the East Coast.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: House of Holy Relics
programme.desc: A medieval engineering marvel might be the home to the remains of the Bible's Three Magi, and we follow the scientists and experts who are delving deep into the mysteries of this incredible religious site.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Blood In The Water
programme.desc: When a bag containing body parts washes up on the shore of the lake, the search for missing 10-year old Holly Jones becomes a grisly murder investigation. Police must race to find the perpetrator of this shocking crime before another child is murdered.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Quiet the Dogs
programme.desc: After Connie Hilton and her husband George leave Dallas and move to a rural enclave in East Texas, life couldn't be more perfect. But one early September morning, their peaceful, easy-living country life is abruptly and brutally shattered for good.

programme.title: Diabolical: Living Off the Dead
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man who looks after the less fortunate in his community. But after a dying man fingers George as the gunman, police discovera monster more diabolical than anyone could ever imagine possible. ...and he's not acting alone.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Was It Worth Killing For?
programme.desc: As a boy, Eric Witte's father taught him to protect his family. But as his father grew increasingly violent, Eric realized his father was the one his family needed protection from. In an extended interview, Eric reflects on the evil that was in his home.

programme.desc: When police question a man in the disappearance of his pregnant ex-girlfriend and her young son, they discover he has a terrifying capacity for violence.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Lying in the Darkness
programme.desc: A jeep swerves off a dark stretch of road and takes the life of a loving mother. When law enforcement arrives, they discover evidence that the accident wasn't the cause of her death.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Pledge
programme.desc: Debbie Smith receives the call every mother dreads: her son, Matthew, has unexpectedly died at college. As police investigate the circumstances of his death, they discover it was more than an accident, and that those closest to him may be to blame.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Unholy Friends
programme.desc: In Parker, Florida, a teenager is found dead days after reconnecting with his birth mother. The young man's mysterious girlfriend leads investigators into a world of occultism and revenge that exposes the secret lives of this victim's friends.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: Diane Holik, a vibrant 43-year old, is about to move from Austin to Houston to start a new life with her fiancé. When she misses a meeting at work police are called to her home. There they find her lifeless body and a killer who's left few clues behind.

programme.title: Before I Die: Amber Alert
programme.desc: On March 14, 2017, Amanda Mangas is found with a single gunshot wound to her chest. She tells police that her baby son, Winston, has been kidnapped before dying from her wounds. This leads to a tri-state Amber Alert in the hunt to save Winston.

programme.title: Shattered: Angel of Death
programme.desc: In 1996, Larry Schlegel visits his elderly mother at the hospital one last time before she succumbs to pneumonia. Then, years later, police give him the shock of his life, when they inform him that her death was not at all what it seemed.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Prowling Wolf
programme.desc: Reports of shots fired at an apartment complex lead police to a horrific discovery: the bodies of a single mother and two of her children. Detectives find answers in shell casings, shoe impressions, and DNA to stop a diabolical predator.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: When a husband finds his wife with a cord around her neck, he makes a heartbreaking 911 call, pleading for someone to come save his beloved. A missing phone, surprising crime scene clues, and a mystery man all complicate this story of love and loss.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Hostage to Greed
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a legal secretary in her Macon, Georgia home leaves police with few clues as to who would want her dead. Then, a co-worker's alibi falls apart, revealing a callous conspiracy of greed that shocks this genteel, southern town.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: New Years Evil
programme.desc: When a popular young woman turns up murdered, investigators must piece together the last few moments of her life to determine who killed her.

programme.title: Broken Trust: The Landlord
programme.desc: Karen Jenkins' building is in a rough area, but she's determined to help the neighbourhood and all of her tenants along with it. The problem is that each of them seems to have something to hide, and one of them will do anything to keep those secrets safe.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Beyond the Grave
programme.desc: Wife and mother Sandra Duyst appears to have it all. Yet what few know is that Sandra struggles with crippling depression. Her death appears as a suicide, but a message from beyond the grave sends the investigation into a strange and unexpected direction.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way

programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Deep Creek Dreaming
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Maryland. Their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people. However, finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Otter Tail Transformation
programme.desc: A family is looking for a lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. They find a property they like, but it's far from turnkey. With a massive renovation, they may discover they've bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories on Lake Martin
programme.desc: A blended family of eight finds a vacation home on Lake Martin, Alabama, but the property needs major renovations. He's a contractor and is ready to get to work with a tight budget and a long to-do list to help the family realize their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Genesis!
programme.desc: Dante’s epic triumph over Arthur ignites his fame in the Blading world as a hero! Intrigued by his win, Gwyn asks Dante to battle him next! Meanwhile, Delta thinks of leaving the world of Blading behind.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: World of X Games: Jamie Anderson: Unconditional
programme.desc: Powder, slush, corduroy and pillows, Unconditional presents the wide pan of Jamie Anderson’s 2019 season as she sets out to expands her horizon beyond the contest bib.

programme.desc: Maris goes missing for days and when she eventually returns, she asks Niles for a divorce.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier the Grinch
programme.desc: When the wrong Christmas gifts arrive for Frederick, Frasier is forced to go to the mall.

programme.title: Frasier: It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
programme.desc: Frasier realizes the depth of his feelings for Kate, only to find out that she's moving the next day.

programme.title: Frasier: The Friend
programme.desc: Frasier's on-air appeal for friendship backfires when a boring man calls in. Frasier decides to meet Bob, but has trouble ending the friendship with his new wheelchair-bound friend when their tastes clearly conflict.

programme.title: Reba: The Accidental Role Model
programme.desc: Reba finds herself in the middle of one of Brock and Barbra Jean's fights once again.

programme.title: Reba: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: Reba grows suspicious when Kyra repeatedly cancels plans with the family.

programme.title: Reba: The Two-Girl Theory
programme.desc: Barbra Jean convinces Reba to go clubbing; Van talks to Jake about the birds and the bees.

programme.title: Reba: Van's Agent
programme.desc: In the midst of wooing a powerful sports agent, Van 'outs' Reba to cover up a bad joke.

programme.title: Reba: Surprise
programme.desc: Van surprises Cheyenne with the news that he's been traded to a team in Denver.

programme.title: Reba: Couple's Therapy
programme.desc: Reba confronts Brock and Barbra Jean's therapist when she learns he holds her responsible.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One for the Money
programme.desc: Dorothy and Sophia flashback to their purchase of the family's first television in 1954.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Rose inherits her late uncle's estate, provided she takes care of his prized pig 'Baby.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: The girls hire a new housekeeper and she puts a curse on their house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nothing to Fear But Fear Itself
programme.desc: Dorothy and Blanche accompany Rose to her aunt's funeral where she must give the eulogy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Letter to Gorbachev
programme.desc: Rose writes to Soviet leader Gorbachev and receives an invitation to Moscow.

programme.title: Movie: Sun, Sand and Romance
programme.desc: Kate is a driven publishing executive visiting a summer resort with her boyfriend. There she runs into Shep, an old high school friend and fellow camp counselor, who is now the Activities Director.

programme.title: Movie: Easter Under Wraps
programme.desc: A young VP of marketing goes undercover at her family's chocolate plant to investigate why sales are down. She meets the head chocolatier who voices his frustrations about what is happening at the plant.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Reverse Cowgirl
programme.desc: An unspeakable tragedy occurs when one of the boys leaves the toilet seat up.

programme.title: The Office: The List
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin staff accidentally discovers a list of their names in the notebook of the company's mysterious new CEO, Robert California, triggering a frenzy of speculation.

programme.title: The Office: The Incentive
programme.desc: After a motivational speech, Robert challenges the office to double their sales. After the new manager promises the unthinkable, everyone in the office suddenly gets motivated to sell. Pam finds an unlikely pregnancy friend.

programme.title: The Office: Lotto
programme.desc: The warehouse guys win the lottery and quit, leaving the rest of the office to fantasize about what their lives would be like had they been the winners.

programme.title: The Office: Garden Party
programme.desc: Andy decides to throw a garden party to try and impress Robert California. Dwight does some research into the party and feels he is making it a very classy event.

programme.title: The Office: Doomsday
programme.desc: Dwight tries to help the office's efficiency by installing a Doomsday device that will get them all fired if they make too many mistakes.

programme.title: The Office: Pam's Replacement
programme.desc: Pregnant Pam recruits Dwight to prove that Jim finds the office's pretty new temp attractive. Meanwhile, Robert California shocks Andy, Darryl, and Kevin when he asks to join their band.

programme.title: The Office: Gettysburg
programme.desc: Andy takes the office on an inspiring trip to Gettysburg in order to motivate everyone.

programme.title: The Office: Mrs. California
programme.desc: Robert California brings his wife into the office to find her a job while Dwight opens a gym in the building.

programme.title: The Office: Trivia
programme.desc: When Oscar joins a trivia night contest, Andy tries to get the whole office involved. Dwight visits headquarters to explore other job opportunities.

programme.title: The Office: Pool Party
programme.desc: Robert decides to sell his mansion following his divorce and Kevin suggests an office pool party before the sale becomes official.

programme.title: The Office: Jury Duty
programme.desc: After Jim returns from jury duty, Dwight questions him about every detail of his case. Meanwhile, Angela and the senator welcome their new baby.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: March 1, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: The Office: Special Project
programme.desc: After Dwight gets assigned to a special project at Sabre headquarters in Tallahassee, he and Andy try to decide which Scranton employees get to go with him. Meanwhile, Pam returns from her maternity leave.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Nice to Meet You, Dr. Isles
programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: I Can't Get No Satisfaction
programme.desc: Still wanting to merge their worlds together, Bill organizes a dinner for Bri's mom, Sharon, and his ex-wife Kathleen to resolve tensions, but soon he becomes the target.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Birthdays, Babies, and Blowups
programme.desc: Rodney finally caves to Desiry's demands and introduces her to his parents. However, Desiry quickly learns that some secrets may be better left in the closet.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Mother's Point of View
programme.desc: Bill is in the dog house after a disastrous dinner with Bri's parents, so to make things right he surprises Bri with a magical trip to reconnect.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: An Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: After a rocky dinner with Reese's family, Nonie makes a big decision about their relationship. Things don't go according to plan when Kattie sets up a double date with Kevin and her best friend Natalie.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Rough Waters Ahead
programme.desc: Bill tries to adjust to Bri's mother Sharon moving into the house, but things quickly go south, leaving Bri torn between Bill and her family.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: After telling Desiry about his infidelity, Rodney has to pull off an all or nothing plan in hopes of winning Desiry's hand. Rick travels to Illinois to beg forgiveness after proposing to Erica and neglecting to ask her father first.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Put a Ring (Back) On It
programme.desc: Rodney's proposal could go either way since Desiry might not forgive him for his past betrayal. Bri realizes their 12,000 square foot mansion isn't enough to separate the tension between her mom and Bill.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Marriage Material
programme.desc: At their engagement party, Rodney faces the heat head on when Desiry's friend confronts him about his infidelity. Bill's parents pay him a visit, and Bri is under pressure to prove to them that she's marriage material.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: JFK Jr's Final Flight
programme.desc: Examining the factors that led to the crash that killed John F. Kennedy Jr. and a never before seen interview with a person who may have been the last person to speak to JFK Jr, moments before the crash.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre
programme.desc: When five family members are found brutally murdered in the small Oklahoma city of Broken Arrow, police are on the hunt for a mass murder.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Nightmare in Fargo
programme.desc: Savanna Greywind couldn’t wait to be a mom. But just before her baby is due, the pregnant 22-year-old disappears from her own apartment. When the baby turns up alive, the investigation reveals a suspect close to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Nightmare in Fargo

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer at College
programme.desc: College lacrosse player Yeardley Love is found dead in her college apartment. But the community is left stunned when cops arrest a member of a wealthy, prominent family.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Another Brick in the Wall
programme.desc: OKC and Texas compete in an old school Cash Days race. Eight drivers from each state race for over $30,000 and the chance to prove that their state has the fastest racers in the country, but a sketchy road throws a wrench into the works for both sides.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Cash Days: Comfortably Numb
programme.desc: On the second night of Cash Days, 405 racers must match up and race, while still fighting to knock out the only remaining Texas driver. The sketchy road is still in play, and it becomes a tuner's game to see who can get down the street in one piece.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Rise of the OG
programme.desc: A horrific crash devastates the 405 as Kamikaze returns to defend The List against a new racer hoping to earn a spot. Shawn makes a big change in an attempt to turn things around and Ryan Martin wastes no time calling out Monza.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Grinding on the Daily
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: Farmtruck and AZN bring back the Daily Driver contest where racers in a variety of rides compete for big dough.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: New Rules, New Road
programme.desc: The Daily Driver field is down to 18. With a new set of rules and a new road to race on, competition gets crazy. But only one driver will take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Aftermath
programme.desc: Big Chief struggles with PTSD after his crash while the 405 racers return to intense list racing. Meanwhile, Doc and Monza try to dethrone Shawn and Dave finally faces Jackie in the Sonoma. Plus, Farmtruck searches for AZN's first car.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: New Rules, New Road
programme.desc: The Daily Driver field is down to 18. With a new set of rules and a new road to race on, competition gets crazy. But only one driver will take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Aftermath
programme.desc: Big Chief struggles with PTSD after his crash while the 405 racers return to intense list racing. Meanwhile, Doc and Monza try to dethrone Shawn and Dave finally faces Jackie in the Sonoma. Plus, Farmtruck searches for AZN's first car.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Frying Pan
programme.desc: Deep in New Mexico's Chihuahuan Desert, Joe struggles to get out of an abandoned mineshaft.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Stranded in a mangrove swamp in Sri Lanka, Joe and Cody escape the crocodile-filled waters only to find themselves in a leech-infested jungle. But this time, distressed elephants interrupt their journey back and they may not get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Joe comes face-to-face with elephants and is forced off a cliff, Cody masters the ancient fire piston, and they cross a crocodile-infested lake to escape the longest survival scenario in history of 'Dual Survival.'

programme.title: Dual Survival: The Green Hell
programme.desc: Joe and Cody learn how to stay alive on the world's deadliest river, if they can keep from killing each other first.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Castaways
programme.desc: Joe and Cody face unpredictable and punishing tropical storms and brave shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Deadly Dunes
programme.desc: Marooned in a sea of sand dunes, Joe and Cody traverse the unforgiving desert and trek deep into the mountains of Oman. Threatened by dehydration and heatstroke, their journey shows how nomads have survived for millennia in this hyper-arid land.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Navy Strength Rum
programme.desc: Outlaw shiners and legal distillers compete to distill true Navy Strength Rum, but the bar for entry is 114-proof. With Tickle as honorary pirate and judged by shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one distiller can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Gin Craze
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make gin, a notorious spirit with medieval roots that is still prized in the backwoods today. Judged by legendary shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Amateurs compete to make absinthe.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Mo Toes, Mo Problems
programme.desc: A man with an enormous lump on his foot creates a mystery for Dr. Vincent. Dr. Schaeffer faces a case of a wart cluster that is all over a man's foot and patient Kiara has the first double big toe the doctor has ever come face-to-face with.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Callus Catastrophe!
programme.desc: Nate sees Dr. Brad for help with the raging calluses on his feet. Savannah has a rare condition that made her big toe grow to an enormous size and hopes Dr. Ebonie can help. Dr. Brad is determined to uncover the mystery behind John's massive foot growth.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Jerry Bites Back

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Pray for Snow

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Blindsided

programme.title: The Holzer Files: A Grave Revenge

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Phantom Crew
programme.desc: The team reopens Hans Holzer's investigation into a Revolutionary War-era warship in Baltimore Harbor. They discover the spirits of the ship's deep, dark past may still be manning their positions on a postmortem mission.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: They Buried me Alive
programme.desc: The team resurrects Hans Holzer's case file on the Morris-Jumel Mansion in New York City. They investigate reports of a dark and mysterious presence lurking in the shadows of the historic home decades after Holzer helped a restless spirit move on.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: The Haunting of Lambert Castle
programme.desc: The team resurrects Hans Holzer's investigation of a mysterious castle in Paterson, New Jersey. Their exploration of the lavish mansion reveals a woman's recurring nightmares may have a supernatural source in the dwelling's dark history.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Legends and Lies
programme.desc: The team revives Hans Holzer's investigation of the Ocean-Born Mary House in Henniker, New Hampshire. They traverse multiple states and boldly wade into the dark waters of New England folklore in search of the elusive truth behind the mysterious haunting.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Awkward
programme.desc: Jenna’s jealousy mounts as the charter guests continue to shamelessly flirt with Adam. Paget and Ciara can’t get on the same page but Paget and Georgia are perfectly in tune. Adam makes a big romantic gesture for Jenna that backfires.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: The Birds
programme.desc: A murder of crows in the mast stirs up seafaring superstitions that put the crew on edge and the boat on its side. Madison and Georgia friendship is pushed to the brink. While Paget and Chris begin a very British bromance, Adam keeps Genna at a distance.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Jenna and Adam try to move forward in their strained relationship. When Jenna joins Adam for a nap on her break, Madison and Ciara pick up the slack in service, and Glenn takes notice. Chris gets injured handling a heavy water toy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Dope!
programme.desc: Captain Glenn confronts Jenna about her relationship with Adam. A doctor visits and delivers bad news that could end one crew member’s career. Captain Glenn is shocked to learn that someone may have brought illegal drugs onto the boat.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Regatta Go!
programme.desc: The season finale finds a drug search on board the Parsifal III, sending some crew into a panic. A heated conflict erupts in the interior department, causing tensions to boil over. Captain Glenn takes the crew out one final time for a birthday.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Running on Fumes
programme.desc: Captain Glenn and Parsifal are back! This time in Croatia and ready to welcome a whole new crew aboard to a wild season full of over-the-top antics.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Running on Fumes

programme.desc: The Honor crew welcomes their first group of charter guests: a gaggle of flamboyant fashion photographers who prove to be a boatload of trouble. Kat makes a shocking discovery that forces her into an agonizing decision.

programme.title: Below Deck: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a night out, but Kat enjoys a few too many cocktails. Meanwhile, the new charter guests, a wealthy hypnotist and his friends, come aboard and their special dietary demands tax the crew to the breaking point.

programme.title: Below Deck: Luggage, Luggage Everywhere

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Living With the Devil

programme.title: Below Deck: Sleeping With the Enemy

programme.title: Below Deck: Naughty Yachties

programme.desc: Tempers flare on deck as the crew prepares for their first group of charter guests, a larger-than-life group of fun-loving Southerners. A rowdy, randy charter guest wants to get very friendly with new deckhand, Andrew. Kelley and Jennice get flirty.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tour de Pants
programme.desc: A customer is brought to tears when the shop presents him with a chopper dedicated to his lost mother. Later, Danny surprises his band member with a hippy van, while Mike and Scott race to settle a score.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Calendar

programme.title: Counting Cars: Blinged Out Blazer

programme.title: Counting Cars: '68 Killer Camaro
programme.desc: A high end client has his heart set on a tricked out '68 Camaro, so Danny sets out to find one and give it the world class Counts Kustoms treatment.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mangled Mustang

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mangled Mustang

programme.desc: NCIS strikes a deal with a convicted murderer giving him a 48-hour furlough at his former residence, now McGee's home, in exchange for information that can convict his former cellmate, the murderer who deceived Gibbs and Fornell.

programme.title: NCIS: Ready or Not

programme.title: NCIS: Double Down
